text:
Insurance
1 - Disability Insurance benefits
2 - ESRD
3 - Disability Insurance and ESRD
E_OREC Original Reason for Medicare Entitlement 0 - Old Age and Survivor's Insurance
1 - Disability Insurance benefits
2 - ESRD
3 - Disability Insurance and ESRD
E_MS_CD Medicare Status Code (year end) 10 - Aged without ESRD
11 - Aged with ESRD
20 - Disabled without ESRD
21 - Disabled with ESRD
31 - ESRD only
E_PRIMARY_PAYER_CD A Medicare beneficiary with medical coverage by some other primary payer - either
